title: Upon Bran. Epig.
content:
What made that mirth last night? the neighbours say,
    That Bran the baker did his breech beray:
    I rather think, though they may speak the worst,
    'Twas to his batch, but leaven laid there first.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Bran. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
